sourceMovie.title: Ballerina
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Ballerina works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Ballerina clicked for you, Kill Bill: Vol. 2 (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Ballerina?
faq.answer: Try Kill Bill: Vol. 2, The Equalizer 3, The Mechanic—each shares DNA with Ballerina while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Ballerina?
faq.answer: Ballerina (2025) is best described as Action, Thriller, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Ballerina worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
